case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LAI FONG LEONG WONG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED SEP-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LAI FONG LEONG
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.57 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LAI FONG LEONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, LAI FONG LEONG $1,800.57 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,885.57 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LAI FONG LEONG WONG DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
